text.title: files-reference Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for a routing candidates report plus valid/invalid examples.

example.note: One section picked, one slug, Glob-resolved (resolved:true), candidate count <= 2.
Three violations: section="all" (not a single named section), 3 candidates (>2), resolved=false everywhere (no Glob verification).

list.item: section is one named section, never "all".
Every candidate has resolved=true (Glob verified) before the report is consumed.
stale_rows lists unresolved candidates that should trigger a catalog refresh.
candidate_path is absolute or workspace-rooted relative — never a catalog-row snippet.
